meta_title: Sunday Match — organize the game with one link
meta_description: One-click sign-up, a live roster with reserves, and a bot in your group chat. Stop copying lists by hand.
brand_tagline: Organize the game with one link
hero_headline: Organize the game with one link
hero_subline: One-click sign-up, a live roster with starters and reserves, reminders before the match — right in your group chat.
pain_point_copying: The list gets copied by hand after every new message in the group.
pain_point_dropout: Twelve players on Thursday, seven on Sunday morning.
pain_point_payments: Who has paid and who hasn't — nobody remembers.
pain_point_reserves: Reserves find out they're playing 30 minutes before kick-off.
solution_oneclick_desc: Drop a link in the group — everyone signs up themselves. No registration for players.
solution_livelist_desc: Starters and reserves visible to everyone, updated instantly.
solution_bot_desc: The bot posts the updated roster to your Telegram group on every change.
cta_subtitle: Leave an email and we'll write when early access opens. The first teams play free.
cta_disclaimer: No spam. One email, when we're ready.
form_success_joined: Done — we'll write when access opens. ✅
form_success_already: You're already on the list — talk soon. ✅
form_error: Something went wrong — try again in a bit.
quiz_thanks: Thanks! This helps us build the thing you actually need.
quiz_q_organize: How do you organize matches today?
quiz_q_organize_chat: Group chat message, counting by hand
quiz_q_pain: Which of these happened to you last month?
quiz_q_pain_denied: Lost the pitch because we were too few
quiz_q_pain_payment: Argument about who paid and who didn't
auth_signin_subtitle: We'll email you a sign-in link.
auth_magic_sent: Check your inbox — we sent you a sign-in link.
auth_shell_empty: A dashboard is coming here soon.
